summary: TCPA Compliance Features testing completed successfully. All 24 backend tests passed. Features tested: calling hours enforcement with state-specific restrictions, National DNC Registry check (internal only - DNC_API_KEY not configured), and full TCPA compliance check combining all 5 checks.
critical_code_review_comments: TCPA compliance implementation is comprehensive with 5 checks: calling_hours, internal_dnc, national_dnc, number_verification, call_frequency
Area code to timezone mapping covers 200+ US area codes with state identification
State-specific calling restrictions properly implemented: TX (9am-9pm), CT (9am-8pm), FL (8am-8pm), etc.
National DNC Registry external API integration ready but requires DNC_API_KEY environment variable
Calling hours check provides detailed response including next_allowed_time when blocked
Full compliance check correctly blocks calls and provides clear reasons
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: TCPA compliance features fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/compliance/status, GET /api/compliance/calling-hours/{phone}, GET /api/compliance/national-dnc/{phone}, GET /api/compliance/check/{phone}. National DNC external API not configured (requires DNC_API_KEY) - internal list check works. Calling hours enforcement working with state-specific restrictions.

compliance_status_endpoint.GET /api/compliance/status: Returns TCPA config with state restrictions - PASS

calling_hours_endpoint.texas_number: Correctly identifies TX state, Central timezone, 9am-9pm restriction - PASS
calling_hours_endpoint.california_number: Correctly identifies CA state, Pacific timezone, Federal 8am-9pm - PASS
calling_hours_endpoint.connecticut_number: Correctly identifies CT state, Eastern timezone, 9am-8pm restriction - PASS
calling_hours_endpoint.florida_number: Correctly identifies FL state, 8am-8pm restriction - PASS
calling_hours_endpoint.blocked_reason: Provides clear reason and next_allowed_time when blocked - PASS

national_dnc_endpoint.response_structure: Includes on_national_dnc, checked, source fields - PASS
national_dnc_endpoint.warning_message: Shows warning about DNC_API_KEY not configured - PASS

full_compliance_check_endpoint.GET /api/compliance/check/{phone}: Returns full TCPA compliance check - PASS
full_compliance_check_endpoint.calling_hours_field: Includes calling_hours details with timezone, state, restriction - PASS
full_compliance_check_endpoint.national_dnc_field: Includes national_dnc details with on_registry, checked, source - PASS
full_compliance_check_endpoint.checks_performed: Lists all 5 checks: calling_hours, internal_dnc, national_dnc, number_verification, call_frequency - PASS
full_compliance_check_endpoint.reasons_when_blocked: Provides clear reasons array when call is blocked - PASS

mocked_apis_list: National DNC Registry external API - requires DNC_API_KEY environment variable (currently using internal list only)
mocked_apis.note: National DNC external API integration is implemented but not configured. System falls back to internal DNC list check. Configure DNC_API_KEY for full National DNC Registry compliance.

calling_hours_blocked.reason: Too early to call TX (07:31 AM local). Texas (9am-9pm) - wait 88 minutes

national_dnc_check.warning: External DNC API not configured. Configure DNC_API_KEY for National DNC Registry compliance.
